summary_en: KANTSU HD completed a buyback of 125,000 shares (1.2% of outstanding) for ¥51.0M via ToSTNeT-3 on May 18, 2026, to improve capital efficiency.
title_en: Notice of Share Buyback Results and Completion via Off-Exchange Transaction (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: KANTSU HD Co., Ltd. (ticker 9326, TSE Growth) announced on May 18, 2026 the completion of its share buyback program that was authorized by the Board of Directors on May 15, 2026. The company purchased exactly 125,000 shares of its own common stock for a total consideration of ¥51.0 million via ToSTNeT-3, an off-exchange trading mechanism of the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The acquired shares represent 1.2% of outstanding shares (excluding treasury stock). The buyback rationale is to enhance capital efficiency and execute flexible capital allocation policies in response to changing business conditions. The acquisition has now been completed and concluded.
